items.example: Let's get started on the first task.
Write to-do lists and prioritise tasks.
I prefer not to multitask but to focus on one job at a time.

items.term: leave things until the last minute
items.example: A procrastinator leaves things until the last minute.
I keep putting off writing my essay.
Don't get distracted by your phone while working.
I don't usually waste time on social media.
I'd like to get this done ahead of time.
He worked hard to meet the deadline.
I've made all the arrangements for the party.
